meaning: n.伯利兹(国)人adj.伯利兹国(人)的
examples: Yet he may have to, or risk forfeiting Belizean assets abroad.
This week Guatemala expelled Belize's ambassador for aiding the escape of three Belizean soldiers arrested last month.
Of all of these different races, religions and rituals, none is more intriguing than the Belizean Mennonites.
Belize now has more native speakers of Spanish than of English or its lilting cousin, Belizean Creole.
